title: Contractors Judgement
description: Contractor's Judgment is a dark, high-stakes progression mod focused on power through deals, relics, and sacrifice. Designed for adventurous players who seek risk, strategy, and more.
body:
Contractor's Judgment is a dark, high-stakes progression mod focused on power through deals, relics, and sacrifice. Designed for adventurous players who seek risk, strategy, and a deep upgrade system, this mod adds layers of gameplay complexity through its key systems:

 Tools & Contracts
Tools in this mod aren’t just gear — they’re bound by Contracts that can alter your playstyle or the world around you. Each tool can be enhanced with various Effects, including:

Betrayal – Chance for enemies (or even allies) to turn on each other.

Darkness – Cloak areas in shadow or summon dark forces.

Decorative Blocks – Stylish and sinister new building blocks.

Abilities – Weapons gain unique skills based on their type (swords slash faster, axes cleave wider, etc).

 Trinkets
Equip powerful Trinkets that change how you fight, explore, or survive. Each comes with:

Passive Abilities – Always-on effects like regen, speed boosts, or resistances.

Active Damage Effects – Fire bursts, shadow explosions, or life-steal on hit.

Synergy Bonuses – Combine trinkets for stronger combo effects.

 Origins
Choose or earn Origins that define your character’s supernatural traits. Origins bring:

Unique Passives – Natural enhancements like night vision, water breathing, or stealth.

Debuffs & Curses – Every origin has a price — from sunlight weakness to uncontrollable rage.

Special Abilities – Activate hidden powers, like teleportation, summoning, or void-walking.

 Enchants
Go beyond vanilla enchanting with a new tier of Enchants, categorized into:

Power Enchants – Direct damage boosts or effect stacking.

Curses – Risky enchantments that offer great power but with downsides.

Ability Enchants – Grant active skills to armor or weapons (e.g., dash, block reflect, fire aura).

 Gameplay Themes & Style
Dark Fantasy meets Contract Magic – Make deals with unknown forces for power.

Choice & Consequence – Power comes with risks: are you willing to pay the cost?

Customization & Synergy – Build your character with layered systems that interact in complex ways.


(inspired from the content SMP by Doctor4t) also my first official Modpack

I hope you like it.

(HEAVILY INSPIRED OF CHARTER FROM ARATHAIN LIKE THE MAIN MOD STATES LOL CREIDITS TO THEM ESPESICLY (yes ik i spelled it wrong) _SPUDER_441 BYE BYE (runs on both client and server side)
